name: codealive-mcp
description: Semantic code search and codebase Q&A for Claude Desktop using your CodeAlive account or self-hosted deployment.
long_description: CodeAlive gives Claude Desktop access to semantic code search, artifact fetch, repository discovery, and architecture-aware codebase Q&A. This extension runs locally via MCP and supports both CodeAlive Cloud and self-hosted deployments.

tools.name: get_data_sources
tools.description: List indexed repositories and workspaces that are ready for search and chat.

tools.name: codebase_search
tools.description: Search indexed code semantically across repositories and workspaces.

tools.name: fetch_artifacts
tools.description: Fetch full source for specific search results when you need the underlying code.

tools.name: codebase_consultant
tools.description: Ask architecture and implementation questions with full codebase context.

tools.name: get_artifact_relationships
tools.description: Inspect relationships between artifacts returned by CodeAlive search.

api_key.title: CodeAlive API Key
api_key.description: Bearer token for your CodeAlive Cloud or self-hosted deployment.

base_url.title: CodeAlive Base URL
base_url.description: Deployment origin for CodeAlive. Use the root URL, for example https://codealive.yourcompany.com. Values ending with /api are accepted and normalized automatically.

ignore_ssl.title: Ignore TLS Errors
ignore_ssl.description: Disable TLS certificate validation for development or self-signed test environments only.
